title: Established B2B Facility Services Business with Recurring Revenue
description:
Established B2B commercial cleaning and facility services company serving hygiene-focused facilities throughout Tampa Bay. Operations are Monday–Friday only, providing essential weekly services with strong recurring revenue.

Positioned as commercial cleaning (not janitorial), the company delivers higher-value facility services to professional and high-traffic commercial clients.

Services Include:

Commercial facility cleaning

Deep cleaning (floors, power washing, window cleaning)

Storefront and exterior services

Client Types:
Restaurants, gyms, retail locations, auto dealerships, and other commercial storefronts.

Total Business Count in Territory: 41,873

Recurring weekly B2B revenue

Hygiene-focused facilities

National account relationships

Monday–Friday operations

Scalable platform with upsell and expansion potential

Ideal for an owner-operator or investor seeking a recession-resistant, recurring-revenue service business. NDA required for financial details.

Ad#:2460929
